summary: Verified and confirmed world-bible/history.json — a 742-year timeline (YK calendar) spanning 5 eras: The Unfinished Age (pre-Pallor flux and god-war), The Rending (Pallor creation and Ythara's sealing), The Laying of Foundations (empire and Conclave formation), The High Tenure (imperial peak and institutional decay), The Thinning (present crisis). Contains 5 legends (Vigil of Two Fires, Flaying of the Sheltering One, The Last Walk, The Lessening of Cireth, The Pallor's Lament), 6 historical figures (Theron Vaske, Serath, Architect Resiveth, Commander Ossya Thenndal, Seat Herath Velmere, Coraith and Liressyn), 5 foreshadowing hooks tied to craft tools, documented Pallor fluctuation cycles providing camouflage for the 40-year poisoning conspiracy, and series-ready hooks. All key requirements met: Pallor origin from the Sheltering One's sacrifice, Ythara's sealing via the Quietus, kinetic memory route through the Maren/Warden lineage, 40-year poisoning beginning YK 702, Siege of Calwrath at YK 736, fae-empire diplomatic history from First Accords through present hostility, no prophecies. History is weavable into dialogue and discovery per INV-007.

keyRequirementsCovered: Pallor origin from defeated god (Sheltering One)
Ythara the Unfinished sealed at the Quietus
Quietus creation and kinetic memory route
Fae-empire relations and Cerith Court binding contracts
No prophecies — bureaucracy, memory, and inconvenient truths only
